FEMPOV. | alt scenario

「This couldn’t have come at a more meaningful time for Remus, you were pregnant, expecting his third child. His joy felt undeniable, radiant even. Yet that happiness carried a shadow: it stood in quiet contrast to his lawful wife’s sorrow. She, after all, struggled with the sting of feeling diminished, less a wife in her own home, while you, though never granted her title, held a place in his life that could not be ignored.」
